data.title: American Express reports Q3 2025 revenue up 11% yoy to $18.43B, beating expectations. Adjusted EPS at $4.14 vs $4.00 expected. Stock gains traction.
data.description: American Express Co (NYSE: AXP) released its third-quarter 2025 results, outperforming analyst expectations for revenue and adjusted earnings per share. AXP stock is experiencing positive momentum. The company reported a 11% year-over-year growth in quarterly revenue (net of interest expense), reaching $18.43 billion, surpassing the analyst consensus of $18.05 billion. The revenue surge was fueled by robust Card Member spending, increased net interest income from growing revolving loan balances, and accelerated card fee growth. The adjusted EPS also exceeded forecasts, at $4.14 compared to the analyst estimate of $4.00. This information is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Nasdaq seeks SEC approval to list tokenized shares on blockchain, backed one-for-one by traditional shares. Supporters see it as maturing blockchain infrastructure, while critics question the need. Nasdaq's move represents a shift towards direct participation in crypto space.
data.description: Nasdaq has requested SEC approval to list tokenized shares on its platform, digital replicas of traditional equities recorded on a blockchain that offer advantages like around-the-clock trading and instant settlement. Each token would be backed by a physical share, maintaining the same rights. The move signifies a shift towards mainstream acceptance of blockchain technology in financial markets. While some view it as innovation, critics question the necessity given the efficiency of current equity markets. This move by Nasdaq, a traditional institution also involved in crypto trading tech, indicates a move towards direct involvement in the crypto space. Gary Gensler's more positive stance on crypto as the new SEC chairman could influence the decision.

data.title: CD Valet offers consumers a tool - October APY Checkpoint - to compare CD rates easily.#CDValet #CD #savings #APY
data.description: A company named CD Valet, based in Seattle, released its latest tool called the October APY Checkpoint on October 17, 2025. This digital marketplace serves to link customers to top CD rates and terms across the country. The APY Checkpoint is designed to provide real-time updates, allowing consumers to quickly assess the rates offered on their Certificates of Deposit (CD). Through this tool, individuals can easily compare and track the latest CD rates available.

data.title: USA Wind Farms Database 2025: 2,323 entries, 159.7 GW Onshore, 71.07 GW Offshore from ResearchAndMarkets.com
data.description: The "USA Wind Farms Database" is now available through ResearchAndMarkets.com. This comprehensive database provides detailed information on 2,323 wind farms in the United States, encompassing both onshore and offshore projects. The cumulative capacity of the featured projects totals 159.7 GW for onshore wind energy and 71.07 GW for offshore wind energy. This resource is invaluable for professionals in the renewable energy sector seeking crucial insights into the onshore wind market.

data.title: Alliant Energy Corp declares $0.5075 per share quarterly dividend, record date Oct. 31, paid Nov. 17. Paid dividends 320 consecutive quarters since 1946.
data.description: The Board of Directors at Alliant Energy Corporation (NASDAQ: LNT) based in Madison, Wisconsin, announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.5075 per share. This dividend will be paid on November 17, 2025, to shareholders of record as of October 31, 2025. The company has a long history of paying dividends on its common stock, with 320 consecutive quarters of payments since 1946. Alliant Energy Corporation is included in the S&P 500 Dividend Aristocrats Index, showcasing its reputation as a consistent dividend payer. Alliant Energy Corporation (NASDAQ: LNT) is a provider of energy services.

data.title: Garnier & Becky G hold free block party in LA to celebrate Hispanic Heritage Month, putting Hispanic-owned businesses in focus. (Character count: 119)
data.description: On October 17, 2025, in Los Angeles, Garnier showcased Hispanic-owned businesses at a block party in collaboration with Fructis ambassador Becky G. The event was held in Downtown LA and was open to the public free of charge to celebrate Hispanic Heritage Month.

data.title: Petsense by Tractor Supply celebrates 20th anniversary with Fall Adoptathon on Oct 18, connecting pets with homes nationwide.
data.description: Petsense by Tractor Supply, a subsidiary of Tractor Supply Company (NASDAQ: TSCO), is commemorating its 20th anniversary with the annual Fall Adoptathon. On October 18, stores across the country will partner with local shelters and rescues to facilitate the adoption of numerous pets. The event will take place from 10:00 a.m. to 4:00 p.m. local time at all Petsense by Tractor Supply store outlets. This initiative aims to find loving forever homes for thousands of dogs, cats, and other small pets.

data.title: Seattle Reign FC partners with Paula's Choice Skincare for upper-back kit sponsorship, focusing on women's empowerment.
data.description: A skincare brand from Seattle has become the official upper-back kit sponsor for the club. Paula's Choice Skincare, a global brand, will be the presenting partner for their upcoming events. This partnership emphasizes a mutual dedication to women's empowerment, performance, and innovation. From the Pacific Northwest, this collaboration will shine on the global stage.

data.title: Montefiore Einstein partners with Dandelion Health to accelerate AI-driven drug development and clinical care.
data.description: A strategic partnership has been formed between Montefiore Einstein and Dandelion Health, Inc., based in Bronx, N.Y., on October 17, 2025. This collaboration aims to enhance clinical care and drug development efforts. Montefiore Einstein becomes the latest health system to team up with Dandelion, signifying a significant step forward in their joint mission.

data.title: Two Seas Capital urges Core Scientific shareholders to reject sale to CoreWeave as it undervalues company. Vote AGAINST proposed transaction on GOLD Proxy Card.
data.description: A shareholder letter has been sent out urging shareholders to vote against the proposed transaction that undervalues Core Scientific. The letter references market evidence to support its claim. Two Seas Capital LP is at the forefront of this movement, encouraging shareholders to vote against the proposed transaction on the GOLD proxy card. The letter was issued in New York on October 17, 2025. Shareholders are urged to consider the market evidence presented and make an informed decision on the transaction that values Core Scientific accurately.

data.title: Buscar Company completes 43-101 report for Eon Discovery Inc's Treasure Canyon Gold Mine in California. OTF: CGLD.
data.description: In Beverly Hills, California on October 17, 2025, Buscar Company (OTC: CGLD) shared that its subsidiary Eon Discovery Inc. has wrapped up an independent National Instrument 43-101 (NI 43-101) Technical Report for the Treasure Canyon Gold Mine.

data.title: Fourier Health secures $8.4M funding to enhance clinical care intake with AI, led by Yosemite & others.
data.description: In a funding round led by Yosemite, Fourier Health has secured investment from NextGen Venture Partners, Innospark Ventures, Tau Ventures, and several other participants. The Miami-based company, established on October 17, 2025, specializes in a clinician-in-the-loop AI platform that effectively organizes patient clinical data for various applications.

data.title: Encord releases world's largest open-source multimodal dataset to advance AI dev, reducing training time and compute needs.
data.description: A significant new resource is being introduced to revolutionize the method of model training for the democratization of development in multimodal AI. This advancement aims to significantly decrease training time and computational demands for developers. The company leading this initiative, Encord, based in San Francisco, announced this latest development on October 17, 2025. This innovation is poised to transform the landscape of AI development, making it more accessible and efficient for builders.
